targets.rawSql: with base as (select count(*) as total from risk_decisions where created_ts_ms > (extract(epoch from now() - interval '24 hours')*1000)), mm as (select count(*) as mismatch from risk_decisions a join risk_snapshot s using(decision_id) where a.created_ts_ms > (extract(epoch from now() - interval '24 hours')*1000) and (coalesce(a.effective_execution_policy,'') <> coalesce(s.effective_execution_policy,'') or abs(coalesce(a.adjusted_notional_usd,0)-coalesce(s.adjusted_notional_usd,0)) > 0.000001 or abs(coalesce(a.leverage_cap,0)-coalesce(s.leverage_cap,0)) > 0.000001 or abs(coalesce(a.clamp_ratio,0)-coalesce(s.clamp_ratio,0)) > 0.000001)) select now() as time, case when base.total > 0 then (mm.mismatch::double precision / base.total::double precision) else 0 end as value from base, mm

with mism as (select a.sid from risk_decisions a join risk_snapshot s using(decision_id) where a.sid is not null and a.created_ts_ms > (extract(epoch from now() - interval '24 hours')*1000) and (coalesce(a.effective_execution_policy,'') <> coalesce(s.effective_execution_policy,'') or abs(coalesce(a.adjusted_notional_usd,0)-coalesce(s.adjusted_notional_usd,0)) > 0.000001 or abs(coalesce(a.leverage_cap,0)-coalesce(s.leverage_cap,0)) > 0.000001 or abs(coalesce(a.clamp_ratio,0)-coalesce(s.clamp_ratio,0)) > 0.000001)), agg as (select sid, count(*) as c from mism group by sid) select now() as time, count(*)::double precision as value from agg where c >= 3

select now() as time, tier || '_deny' as metric, sum(deny_count)::double precision as value from risk_decision_summary_1h where window_name='24h' group by tier union all select now() as time, tier || '_clamp' as metric, sum(clamp_count)::double precision as value from risk_decision_summary_1h where window_name='24h' group by tier

panels.title: Risk Decision Latency avg by Tier (24h summary)

targets.rawSql: select now() as time, tier as metric, avg(decision_latency_avg_ms)::double precision as value from risk_decision_summary_1h where window_name='24h' group by tier

list.name: Risk mismatch / quarantine annotations
list.rawSql: select to_timestamp(created_at_ms/1000.0) as time, sid || ' ' || action as text, severity as tags from execution_quarantine_ledger where reason in ('repeated_risk_consistency_mismatch','risk_consistency_mismatch') and created_at_ms > (extract(epoch from now() - interval '24 hours')*1000) order by created_at_ms desc limit 500
